_comment: Hot-reloaded by the executor every ~3s — edit live to control without restart. Copy to arb.config.json.
_borrow_note: MAX flash-loan size (USDC); optimiser picks best size up to this cap. Keep <=10000 (within-tick math + 3 tick arrays verified accurate to ~10k; beyond needs v2).
_tip_note: tip = tip_fraction_bps% of COMPUTED profit, clamped [1000, 80% of profit]. 3000 = 30%.
_min_profit_note: only fire when predicted profit exceeds this (0.0005 SOL); must clear Sender's 0.0002 SOL tip floor + fees + repay-buffer.
